definition: A contemplative theme held steadily in mind, around which wholesome thinking and pondering are organized.
notes: In this project jhāna is treated as a contemplative theme rather than a trance-like or absorptive state. Theme is the default because it aligns with the paired activity of vitakka and vicāra and keeps the term connected to an object or topic steadily held in mind. Meditative theme can be used in explanatory prose when plain theme feels too bare. Ven. Dr. M. Punnaji frequently uses ecstasy in retreat materials; the repository records that as a source-backed alternate while retaining the current project default pending any broader editorial decision.

context_rules.context: In project translations discussing the structure of contemplative practice
In explanatory prose referring to the Pāli technical category as such
context_rules.notes: Retaining the Pāli can be appropriate where translation would distract from technical discussion.
